text:
Got the new MacBook Neo

It's great but I somehow can't login to Tailscale

Login via GitHub, then logged in at GitHub then it gets stuck and infinite load at Tailscale

Wanna to use this as a Termius SSH-only device
I've never seen Tailscale so buggy now it won't open the browser to login???
The more "informed" you feel, the less capable of thinking you become.

While I think what Anthropic does is sad for the ecosystem, I wanna give Boris credit for doing what he can to soften the fallout.

Today's release will include some fixes for better cache use, to lower cost for API users.
this is why nobody takes ai twitter seriously

Here's the fully charged version. 47.5 hours!! Of course both of these are just what the machine is pulling at idle. Like when you're thinking about what code to write or reading something. Still. Super impressive.
Also in this release is an expanded set of classic painting backgrounds for the Gruvbox theme.
